question: If the 7th term of an AP is twice the third term and the sum of the first four terms is 42, find the common difference.
If g(x) = x2<sup>2</sup> + 3x  find g(x + 1) - g(x)
solution:
g(x) = x<sup>2</sup> + 3x

When g(x + 1) = (x + 1)<sup>2</sup> + 3(x + 1) 

= x<sup>2</sup> + 1 + 2x + 3x + 3 

= x<sup>2</sup> + 5x + 4

g(x + 1) - g(x) = x<sup>2</sup> + 5x + 8 - (x<sup>2</sup> + 3x)

= x<sup>2</sup> + 5x + 4 - x<sup>2</sup> -3x 

= 2x + 4 or 2(x + 4)

= 2(x + 2)

question:
What is the probability that an integer x (1≤x≤25)
 chosen at random is divisible by both 2 and 3?
What is the loci of a distance 4cm from a given point P?
solution: Locus is the path traced at by a point which moves in accordance with a certain law. It is also the set of all possible position occupied by an object The path traced from all possible location of 4cm from a given point P form a circle of radius 4cm with centre P.

question: The coordinates of the mid-point of the line joining the points (-3,5) and (2,10) is given by?
solution:
Given Data: x<sub>1</sub> = -3,  x<sub>2</sub> = 2,y<sub>1</sub>  = 5,  y<sub>2</sub> = 10

coordinates of the mid-point of the line = (x<sub>1</sub>+x<sub>2</sub> /2, y<sub>1</sub>+y<sub>2</sub> /2)

(−3+2/2, 5+10/2)

=  −1/2) , 15/2)

question:
The sum to infinity of a geometric progression is −1/10
 and the first term is −1/8
. Find the common ratio of the progression.
A man sells his new brand car for N420,000 at a gain of 15%. What did it cost him?
solution:
Cost Price:

Selling price = 100 : (100 + 15)

= 100 : 115

Cost Price

= 100 ÷ 115 of selling price (i.e N420,000)

= 100 ÷ 115 × N420,000

= N365,217.4

∴ Cost Price = N365, 217

question: Find the equation of the perpendicular bisector of the line joining P(2, -3) to Q(-5, 1)
solution:
Given P(2, -3) and Q(-5, 1)

Midpoint = (2+(−5)/2,−3+1/2)
= (−3/2,−1)
Slope of the line PQ = 1−(−3)/−5−2
= −4/7
The slope of the perpendicular line to PQ = −1/(−4/7)
= 7/4
The equation of the perpendicular line: y =7/4x + b
Using a point on the line (in this case, the midpoint) to find the value of b (the intercept).

−1=(7/4)(−3/2) + b
−1+21/8 = 13/8 = b
∴
 The equation of the perpendicular bisector of the line PQ is y = 7/4x + 13/8
≡ 8y = 14x + 13 ⟹ 8y − 14x − 13 = 0

question: The fifth term of an A.P is 24 and the eleventh term is 96. Find the first term.
